title: Audit-Ready Policy Configuration
description: Schema for .audit-policy.json — defines fail-on reason codes and security exceptions

failOn.description: ReasonCode values that should cause a non-zero exit. If omitted, no code triggers a failure.

exceptions.description: Time-bounded security exceptions that suppress matching triage violations.

id.description: Unique identifier for this exception record

purl.description: Package URL this exception applies to — must match the package's purl exactly

reasonCode.description: The reasonCode this exception suppresses. Must match the node's current reasonCode.

reason.description: Human-readable justification for this exception. Minimum 20 characters. Must be a specific technical explanation.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp after which this exception is ignored

approved_by.description: Name or identifier of the approving party (team, individual, or ticket reference)
